title: The Night Archive - No Service
description:
The Night Archive is an episodic first-person horror anthology where each episode places you inside a short, grounded account of fear, survival, and the things people never forget.

The Night Archive: No ServiceThe first episode follows Craig, a man driving alone on a rural road late at night. When his car breaks down, he stops to find help.

For a moment, it feels like he might be okay.

Features• Atmospheric first-person horror built around real-world fear

• Search, observe, and make choices that affect your survival

• Tension built around what you touch, move, damage, or leave behind.
description_short: The Night Archive is an episodic first-person horror series where each episode tells a story pulled from the darkest corners of true crime. These are the stories of those who lived to tell about it.
